summary: Project with existing admin panel and image upload features. User requests mobile responsiveness fixes and UI label updates.
known_issues: UI not rendering properly on mobile devices

existing_features.title: Make the entire public-facing site fully responsive on mobile devices. Audit and fix all layout, spacing, typography, and component issues across: Header (navigation, anchor links, admin panel link), Home/Hero section (particle canvas, hero image, site title), About section (two-column layout should stack vertically on mobile), Services grid, Clinics grid, SocialMedia section, and Footer. Ensure touch targets are adequately sized, text does not overflow, images scale correctly, and grid/flex layouts collapse gracefully at small screen widths (sm breakpoint and below).

In the AdminPanel page and Header component, change the admin login button label from 'Admin' to 'Login'. The button's behavior, styling, and all authentication/session logic must remain exactly the same — only the visible text label changes.

new_feature_requests.summary: Make the UI fully responsive on mobile
Change admin login button label from 'Admin' to 'Login'
